item.title: Friend 'heard silence then screams'
item.description: In October 2024, Rhiannon Whyte, a 27-year-old mother, was finishing her shift at a Walsall hotel when she was targeted by a man she had spent months helping. Deng Chol Majek didn't just kill her; he stalked her to a deserted train station and attacked her 23 times with a screwdriver—19 of those wounds were to her head. But the most disturbing part? Moments later, while emergency lights flashed in the distance, Majek was caught on CCTV buying beer and dancing with friends...

media:content.media:title: Friend 'heard silence then screams'
media:content.media:description: In October 2024, Rhiannon Whyte, a 27-year-old mother, was finishing her shift at a Walsall hotel when she was targeted by a man she had spent months helping. Deng Chol Majek didn't just kill her; he stalked her to a deserted train station and attacked her 23 times with a screwdriver—19 of those wounds were to her head. But the most disturbing part? Moments later, while emergency lights flashed in the distance, Majek was caught on CCTV buying beer and dancing with friends...

item.title: Her daughter was seriously ill, but her mother chose the bar.
item.description: Sharon Goldie was the Scottish mother convicted after her 13-year-old daughter, Robyn Goldie, died in Wishaw in July 2018 from peritonitis caused by a perforated duodenal ulcer. Court findings said Robyn had shown obvious signs of serious illness, asked for help, and that medical treatment might realistically have saved her life. Goldie was later jailed for 3 years and 6 months for neglect and ill-treatment. How many warning signs have to be ignored before neglect becomes impossible to explain away?

media:content.media:title: Her daughter was seriously ill, but her mother chose the bar.
media:content.media:description: Sharon Goldie was the Scottish mother convicted after her 13-year-old daughter, Robyn Goldie, died in Wishaw in July 2018 from peritonitis caused by a perforated duodenal ulcer. Court findings said Robyn had shown obvious signs of serious illness, asked for help, and that medical treatment might realistically have saved her life. Goldie was later jailed for 3 years and 6 months for neglect and ill-treatment. How many warning signs have to be ignored before neglect becomes impossible to explain away?

item.title: The High Price Of Child Neglect: Case Of Debbie Leitch
item.description: Debbie Leitch’s case is one of the most devastating reminders of what can happen when a vulnerable person becomes invisible behind closed doors. A young woman with Down’s syndrome died after prolonged neglect in conditions that shocked even experienced responders, and the case left painful questions not just about one caregiver, but about the systems that failed to step in sooner. How many tragedies like this could be prevented if warning signs were taken seriously earlier?

media:content.media:title: The High Price Of Child Neglect: Case Of Debbie Leitch
media:content.media:description: Debbie Leitch’s case is one of the most devastating reminders of what can happen when a vulnerable person becomes invisible behind closed doors. A young woman with Down’s syndrome died after prolonged neglect in conditions that shocked even experienced responders, and the case left painful questions not just about one caregiver, but about the systems that failed to step in sooner. How many tragedies like this could be prevented if warning signs were taken seriously earlier?

item.title: That Freezer Hid a Gruesome Secret
item.description: In this episode, we explore the tragic case of Leanne Tiernan, a young girl whose life was cut short by the heinous actions of John Taylor. We delve into the details of Leanne's disappearance, the relentless search efforts, and the subsequent investigation that led to the arrest and conviction of her murderer. This analysis not only reflects on the criminal aspects of the case but also pays tribute to Leanne's memory, highlighting the importance of community resilience and the impact of such a loss on society. As we dissect the legal proceedings and the psychological profile of the perpetrator, we aim to bring to light the lessons that can be learned from this case to prevent future tragedies. - Em x

media:content.media:title: That Freezer Hid a Gruesome Secret
media:content.media:description: In this episode, we explore the tragic case of Leanne Tiernan, a young girl whose life was cut short by the heinous actions of John Taylor. We delve into the details of Leanne's disappearance, the relentless search efforts, and the subsequent investigation that led to the arrest and conviction of her murderer. This analysis not only reflects on the criminal aspects of the case but also pays tribute to Leanne's memory, highlighting the importance of community resilience and the impact of such a loss on society. As we dissect the legal proceedings and the psychological profile of the perpetrator, we aim to bring to light the lessons that can be learned from this case to prevent future tragedies. - Em x

item.title: Carly Gregg Invited Her Friend Over to Show Off What She Did!
item.description: A family home should have been the safest place of all, yet in the Carly Gregg case it became the scene of something almost impossible to comprehend. A mother lost her life, a stepfather was nearly killed, and a case involving youth, violence, and accountability left so many people asking how this could happen. Do you believe cases like this are shaped more by warning signs being missed, or by choices that no one could have prevented?

media:content.media:title: Carly Gregg Invited Her Friend Over to Show Off What She Did!
media:content.media:description: A family home should have been the safest place of all, yet in the Carly Gregg case it became the scene of something almost impossible to comprehend. A mother lost her life, a stepfather was nearly killed, and a case involving youth, violence, and accountability left so many people asking how this could happen. Do you believe cases like this are shaped more by warning signs being missed, or by choices that no one could have prevented?

item.title: A Mother That Dimmed Her Child's Light
item.description: A Mother That Dimmed Her Child's Light

media:content.media:title: A Mother That Dimmed Her Child's Light
media:content.media:description: A Mother That Dimmed Her Child's Light

item.title: Her Own "Friends" Did This to Her | Reena Virk
item.description: Reena Virk was at a party under a bridge in Saanich, B.C. with a group of fellow teenagers. She had been bullied for a little while now but little did she know what some of the gang had in store for her on that fateful day. What are your thoughts on this chilling story?

media:content.media:title: Her Own "Friends" Did This to Her | Reena Virk
media:content.media:description: Reena Virk was at a party under a bridge in Saanich, B.C. with a group of fellow teenagers. She had been bullied for a little while now but little did she know what some of the gang had in store for her on that fateful day. What are your thoughts on this chilling story?
